basics.name: Gbanankpon Patrice Alladassivo
basics.title: DevSecOps Platform Engineer Lead
summary: Over 13 years of experience in the Information Technology industry with deep Linux administration and AWS platform expertise.
Hands-on experience designing and deploying cloud infrastructure with AWS, Terraform, Terragrunt, and automation pipelines.
Strong operations and platform background across OpenShift, Kubernetes, observability, security, and system hardening.

skills: AWS multi-account governance (Organizations, Control Tower, SCPs)
Infrastructure as code with Terraform and Terragrunt
CI/CD with GitHub Actions and GitLab
Linux automation with Ansible and Bash
Monitoring with DataDog, Kibana, and CloudWatch
RHEL patching and lifecycle management with Red Hat Satellite

highlights: Analyze, monitor, and re-allocate resources across applications and OpenShift clusters.
Monitor cluster and package vulnerabilities with Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security.
Patch clusters via controlled upgrade channels and version strategy.
Centralize application and infrastructure logs to persistent storage.
Deploy GitLab Runner in-cluster to consume workflows from external GitLab instances.
Lead Dev-Sec-Ops collaboration to sustain platform reliability and security posture.
Created and troubleshot CI/CD pipelines for frontend and backend apps using GitHub Actions.
Integrated multiple security scanning tools in delivery pipelines.
Implemented container vulnerability scanning workflows.
Integrated static analysis for source code quality gates.
Orchestrated containers with Docker Compose.
Built image pipelines and pushed artifacts to Amazon ECR.

experience.role: Sr Linux Systems Engineer / AWS Cloud Engineer / DevOps Engineer
highlights: Supported RHEL, Amazon Linux, and Ubuntu workloads.
Built and deployed AWS infrastructure across VPC, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, Route 53, and ELB.
Automated DevOps workflows using Python, Ansible, Terraform, and Terragrunt.
Managed container platforms on ECR, ECS, and Kubernetes.
Administered and monitored multiple OpenShift clusters including production.
Implemented multi-account security hardening with guardrails and service control policies.
Supported and administered RHEL 6/7/8 environments.
Managed Linux containers with Podman and Docker on RHEL 8.
Built and deployed systems via Kickstart and standard hardening.
Performed file system management with LVM.
Installed and maintained MySQL/MariaDB and shared services (NFS, CIFS, HTTPD, Samba).
Built and deployed Solaris and Linux systems in enterprise environments.
Administered OpenShift container clusters.
Troubleshot performance and stability across RHEL and CentOS hosts.
Managed patching and updates with Red Hat Satellite.
Configured LDAP/AD integration and automount services.

experience.role: Junior System Administrator & C++ Software Developer
highlights: Installed and configured Windows and Ubuntu environments.
Managed user accounts, privileges, and system resources.
Developed sales, inventory, and apartment management applications in C++ with Qt.
Configured software stacks and databases for business operations.

experience.role: Junior System Administrator & C++ Software Developer
highlights: Delivered end-user training for Microsoft Office tools.
Supported and repaired Windows operating systems.
Designed database schema updates and implementation mappings.
Built a C++/Qt data aggregation app for 128 branch offices into a central MS SQL Server database.

education: Bachelor Degree in Computer Information System, Benin
Certified Database Administrator, Aims Community College, CO (2020)
Certified Visual C# Programming, Aims Community College, CO (2020)
